name: Conquer lesser power
description: It's time to erase the lesser power of [cityState] from the map. You will be greatly rewarded for conquering them!

name: Pledge to Defend
description: We need your protection to stop the aggressions of [civName]. By ledging to Defend us you'll earn our loyalty and freindship.

name: Construct Wonder
description: We belive you to should start building [wonder] to show the whole world the strength of your civilization .

name: Errin War
description: We are sick of the wickidness and the evil coming from [cityState]. Destroy them for us and Earn our greatest appreciation!
